    Maps
    Best of 3 (LAN) * Swiss round 4 (teams with a 2-1 record). Winner advances to Stage 3.
    1. 9z removed Anubis
    2. TYLOO removed Dust2
    3. 9z picked Overpass
    4. TYLOO picked Inferno
    5. TYLOO removed Ancient
    6. 9z removed Mirage
    7. Nuke was left over
